name: Almond Thumbprint Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups blanched almonds, toasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Add egg and vanilla; mix well.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
5. Gently stir in toasted almonds.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, forming small mounds about 2 inches apart.
7. Press a thumb into each mound to create an indentation.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
